subject: [PATCH 10/11] mm/zsmalloc: Handle single object charge migration in migrate_zspage

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand
reviews.summary: Raised concerns about the patch's approach to uncharging and charging objects. Suggested an alternative method using existing zs_{charge, uncharge}_objcg functions.

2026-03-11.patch_summary: This patch series addresses zsmalloc migration issues, focusing on single object charge migration in migrate_zspage. It calculates the portion of a compressed object residing on each page and performs up to four uncharge-charges to maintain lruvec association.
